# TiledStyleBinding.WidgetClassId property

The bound widget's class id (28-bit truncated DJB2 of the class name). `0x1E3077C7` is the standard "draw a textured rect" widget class (Background, Framing, Vignette, Divider …); `0x112661D5` is the Stack/Layout container class (Layout_Stack, ControllerStack, Board_Selector_BG …).

```csharp
public uint WidgetClassId { get; set; }
```
